problem_statement: Users require an intuitive tool to manage daily tasks, track their completion status, and organize personal or work-related to-do items effectively.
solution_overview: Develop a user-friendly application (web or mobile) that enables users to create, view, update (mark as complete/edit), and delete tasks. The application will provide a clear interface for managing a list of tasks.
functional_requirements: Users must be able to add new todo items with a title/description.
Users must be able to view a list of all existing todo items.
Users must be able to mark a todo item as complete or incomplete.
Users must be able to delete a todo item.
Todo items must be persistently stored (e.g., in a database or local storage).
non_functional_requirements: The application must be intuitive and easy to use (Usability).
The application should be responsive and load quickly (Performance).
Data integrity must be maintained for all todo items (Reliability).
The application should be accessible across common web browsers or mobile platforms (Compatibility).
tech_stack_recommendation: Frontend: React.js (or Vue.js/Angular) for interactive UI.
Backend: Node.js with Express (for API handling and data persistence).
Database: MongoDB (for flexible document storage) or PostgreSQL (for relational data).
Deployment: Docker for containerization, Heroku/Netlify/Vercel for easy deployment.
